data.title: Vanilla Product
data.subtitle: Hand-picked Grade A pods from partner farmers. Delivered to your  door in 48–72 Hours across France.
data.content: {"eyebrow": "Directly from SAVA, Madagascar.", "trustLine": "🔒 Secure payment · Colissimo tracked · Free returns", "headlineSuffix": "Uncompromised"}

data.title: Trust bars
data.content: {"pillars": [{"id": "1", "icon": "Sprout", "title": "Direct Sourcing", "description": "No middlemen. We work hand-in-hand with partner farmers in the SAVA region."}, {"id": "1777025616661", "icon": "Award", "title": "Grade A Only", "description": "Every pod, berry, and leaf is hand-selected for optimal moisture, aroma, and appearance."}, {"id": "1777025665894", "icon": "PackageCheck", "title": "48–72h in France", "description": "Shipped via Colissimo & FedEx from our French depot. Tracked from warehouse to door."}, {"id": "1777025682399", "icon": "ShieldCheck", "title": "Secure Payment", "description": "SSL-encrypted checkout. Visa, Mastercard, PayPal — fully protected transactions."}]}

data.title: Le Goût du Vrai
data.subtitle: Not all vanilla is created equal. Here's what sets ours apart.
data.content: {"rows": [{"id": "6ecd0f2a-b19c-435e-b8f0-1d244cf3d119", "ours": "SAVA Region, Madagascar", "theirs": "Unknown", "criteria": "Origin traceability"}, {"id": "b58d0c02-1cce-4b59-8bdd-aacd244ac4c9", "ours": "Grade A (Premium)", "theirs": "Commercial Grade", "criteria": "Grade"}, {"id": "4e0ac88e-8d83-4eb9-a2e0-7f7ebe280aab", "ours": "Hand-picked", "theirs": "Machine-harvested", "criteria": "Harvest method"}, {"id": "ef3ec2c9-198f-484d-8c7b-cf1efdd6ba4e", "ours": "1.6–2.0%", "theirs": "< 0.8%", "criteria": "Vanilla content (vanillin)"}, {"id": "1c35ce33-837a-4d58-ad3c-94b17f11ce87", "ours": true, "theirs": false, "criteria": "Price/gram transparency"}, {"id": "99d44885-439c-419d-9b97-40c96b727740", "ours": true, "theirs": false, "criteria": "Direct farmer partnership"}], "title": "Le Goût du Vrai", "eyebrow": "Why it matters", "ourLabel": "🌿 Épices SAVA", "subtitle": "Not all vanilla is created equal. Here's what sets ours apart.", "theirLabel": "Supermarket Spices"}

data.title: Everything you don't need to not know
data.content: {"items": [{"id": "d3a98c3f-44f6-4eeb-8d9b-39573c28bcd1", "answer": "All of our products come directly from partner producers in Madagascar's SAVA region — the world capital of Bourbon vanilla and wild spices. We visit our partners regularly to ensure quality and fair trade conditions.", "question": "Where do your products come from ???"}, {"id": "7912de27-a201-4eb3-a6d7-f5d33fdd03d9", "answer": "We ship from our French depot within 24 hours of your order. Delivery takes 48–72 hours across metropolitan France via Colissimo tracked shipping. International delivery is also available — check at checkout.", "question": "What are your delivery times?"}, {"id": "90d5483e-4ed3-4694-b269-d79718819552", "answer": "Keep your pods in an airtight container away from light and heat, ideally at room temperature (18–22°C). Properly stored pods maintain peak aroma for up to 2 years.", "question": "How should I store vanilla pods?"}, {"id": "2799085b-96f9-443d-a9b2-e5c869f48ad2", "answer": "Yes! We have dedicated pricing for pastry chefs, restaurants, and professional buyers. Contact us via the form below or by email for a custom quote.", "question": "Do you offer bulk or professional orders?"}, {"id": "2f604ab8-8d99-464b-9fd3-ea03c826f57b", "answer": "We accept Visa, Mastercard, and PayPal. All transactions are SSL-encrypted for your security. You can also pay in 3 instalments for orders over €50.", "question": "What payment methods do you accept?"}], "eyebrow": "Got questions?"}

data.title: From the SAVA River, to your kitchen.
data.subtitle: A story rooted in red earth.
data.content: {"body": "In the northeastern highlands of Madagascar, the SAVA region shelters some of the world's most prized vanilla orchids. Our founders travelled there in 2018 not to trade — but to listen. To understand the soil, the harvest cycles, and the families who tend these fields with extraordinary care. What followed was a direct partnership model that skips every middleman and puts premium into the hands of the people who grow it — and the people who cook with it.", "stats": [{"label": "First Partnership", "value": "2018"}, {"label": "Farmer Families", "value": "12+"}, {"label": "Direct Trade", "value": "100%"}], "eyebrow": "A story rooted in red earth.", "imageCaption": "The SAVA Region, northeastern Madagascar — where our vanilla is grown."}

data.title: Trusted across France
data.content: {"eyebrow": "What our customers say", "testimonials": [{"id": "b50b5b56-7c56-46fb-b56e-72437baa92a0", "text": "The vanilla pods are extraordinary — twice the aroma of anything I've found at the market. My crème brûlée has never been the same.", "author": "Marie D.", "avatar": "https://avatars.steamstatic.com/0da18a0c6cad10c88555a63bc02ba0501a316ad2_medium.jpg", "rating": 5, "location": "Paris, France", "verified": true}, {"id": "d57d5fd1-11a8-4607-80d1-5e446cf23845", "text": "Fast delivery, impeccable packaging. The peppercorns are punchy and fresh. I've already reordered twice.", "author": "Julien R.", "avatar": "https://avatars.steamstatic.com/e5a1c670a02b1ac36dd3ed27a5f60838d0368855_medium.jpg", "rating": 5, "location": "Lyon, France", "verified": true}, {"id": "01753719-7b38-4b8c-bdf5-144e030330ba", "text": "Finally a shop that's transparent about origins. The SAVA label gives me confidence. Quality is unmatched at this price.", "author": "Marie-Hélène B.", "avatar": "https://avatars.steamstatic.com/b097548a6319bb1489d045aef1157a93dfa18103_medium.jpg", "rating": 5, "location": "Bordeaux, France", "verified": true}]}
